name: jai-gurudev-frontend
description: Frontend for Jai Gurudev Spiritual Website - A comprehensive MERN stack application featuring a content management system, video transcripts, multi-language support, resource libraries for books and media, and a robust newsletter email system.
author: Antigravity

scripts.render-build: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd .. && GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false CI=false npm run build
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run server

notes.backend_dependency: Requires backend server running on port 5000
notes.python_dependency: Backend requires Python with yt-dlp for transcript functionality
